title: TidyZ 240 DOGGY BAGS WITH TIE HANDLES, POCKET PACK, FRAGRANCED, BLACK (12 rolls of 20 Bags)
features: *AIL are the TidyZ Brand product manufacturer and distributor.
Handy compact rolls ideal for your coat or trouser pockets
Tie Handles - Easy To Tie, carry, and dispose of hygienically
Fragranced to mask and neutralise unpleasant odours
Perforated on a roll for easy dispensing
Bag Measurements: 32cm Open width x 36cm Long including tie handles
description: Product description *AIL iare the TidyZ Brand product manufacturer and distributor. To ensure product authenticity please purchase from "sold by AIL UK"* These really handy rolls are perfect when you're out and about. Compact rolls, yet still with tie handles, the size and strength are perfect for clearing up after your pet conveniently and hygienically. Fragranced with a fresh lemon scent, they aid with masking any unpleasant odours and they are more than strong enough. Brilliant value bags at a fraction of the cost of many comparable options. Ingredients Contains Vegetable Fats in addition to Cocoa Butter, Cheese Food: Cheese (75 %), Skimmed Milk (Water, Skimmed Milk Powder), Emulsifying Salts (Sodium Citrates, Potassium Citrates), Milk Proteins, Butter, Skimmed Milk Powder, Whey Powder (from Milk), Vitamin D, Preservative (Sorbic Acid), Acidity Regulator (Citric Acid), Anti-Caking Agent (Sunflower Lecithins), Cocoa Solids 20 % minimum, †The equivalent of 426 ml of Fresh Liquid Milk in every 227 g of Milk Chocolate, Wheat Crackers: Wheat Flour ( Manufacturer Contact Information AIL, WA16 8GS. See more
